prompts: Which leads should I call today?

replies.text: You have 8 overdue invoices worth ₹2.14L. The highest-risk invoices are Mehta Stores (₹38,400, 12 days overdue) and City Fashion (₹29,700, 9 days overdue). I can draft follow-up messages for both.
Four SKUs may stock out within 14 days. Blue cotton shirt · M is most urgent: 34 units available, 12 committed, estimated stock-out in 6 days. Recommended reorder: 80 units from Sharma Textiles.
Draft: “Hi Mehta Stores, a gentle reminder that invoice INV-1048 for ₹38,400 is pending since 10 July. Please share an expected payment date. I can resend the invoice if helpful.”
Your draft GST summary for July shows taxable sales of ₹8.72L, output GST of ₹1.57L, eligible input credit of ₹94,000, and estimated net GST payable of ₹63,000. Four transactions need review.
Prioritise Ahuja Retail, Royal Menswear and Gupta Garments today. Their combined estimated value is ₹2.82L. Ahuja Retail has the strongest intent with an 88% conversion score.

fallbackReply: I found relevant information across your connected systems. Based on your current records, I recommend reviewing the pending payment from Mehta Stores and the blue cotton shirt stock risk first.
